parents.subject: LU-12187 llapi: EC layout creation support

commit.subject: LU-12187 lov: Basic support for creating EC layout
commit.message:
LU-12187 lov: Basic support for creating EC layout

This makes it possible to create EC'd layouts, with
the flag correctly set.  This does NOT include
support for properly saving cstripe or dstripe.

And it probably shouldn't set the supported flag on
the MDT, but it needs to for testing.  A problem to
solve later.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Signed-off-by: Bobi Jam <bobijam@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I7328af998c15457b2515bb949f88b13340a443e7
